MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_er40_rtcr.LongName: ER40 Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_er40_rt.LongName: ER40 Median Response Time for All Responses

cnb_er40_fcrt.LongName: ER40 Median Response Time for Correct Female Trial Responses

cnb_er40_mcrt.LongName: ER40 Median Response Time for Correct Male Trial Responses

cnb_er40_noe.LongName: ER40 Correct No Emotion Trial Responses

cnb_er40_fpn.LongName: ER40 False Positive No Emotion Responses

cnb_er40_angrt.LongName: ER40 Median Response Time for Correct Anger Trial Responses

cnb_er40_fearrt.LongName: ER40 Median Response Time for Correct Fear Trial Responses

cnb_er40_haprt.LongName: ER40 Median Response Time for Correct Happy Trial Responses

cnb_er40_noert.LongName: ER40 Median Response Time for Correct No Emotion Trial Responses

cnb_er40_sadrt.LongName: ER40 Median Response Time for Correct Sad Trial Responses

cnb_er40_cnt_250.LongName: ER40 Total Count of Responses Under 250 milliseconds

cnb_er40_lrsr.LongName: ER40 Longest Run of Same Responses

cnb_er40_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Penn Emotion Recognition Test

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
